**→ how to stitch the cycles/data together?**

- most important thing is to check if p16+ cells are included and
 > haven´t been discarded

### Agenda {#agenda-8 .unnumbered}

**t-CyCIF Process Update**

- Ongoing issues; please refer to Naipunya's slides for details.

- Topics under review:

 - Cell phenotyping

 - Clustering

 - Removal of vimentin and PD-1 from the analysis pipeline

**GeoMX**

#### **Current Issues** {#current-issues .unnumbered}

- FIMM's sequencing was completed later than expected.

- There have been challenges transferring this sensitive data.

- The instructions for encrypting the data were unclear, and
 > generating the encryption key required significant time.

- FIMM was unable to get the encryption keys to function properly.
 > Resolving this issue took additional time because Iga is the only
 > person here with prior experience, and even she was unable to
 > identify the cause of the problem.

perly.
 > Resolving this issue took additional time because Iga is the only
 > person here with prior experience, and even she was unable to
 > identify the cause of the problem.

- On Monday evening, **new encryption keys were created**, and we are
 > hopeful that these will work.

- If the keys cannot be opened in Allas, *Plan B* is to deliver the
 > keys through an alternative method.

- All keys have been created and stored on the Linux workstation in
 > Lola's office, so they are readily available.

- Once access is established, the next steps will be:

 1. Decrypt the data using the keys.

 2. Transfer the data to Kaiyang.

> **Scheduling note:\
> **Ella will be at the health center tomorrow, and on Friday she will
> only be available during the morning, as she needs to leave for
> fieldwork around 14:00.

### **Next Steps** {#next-steps .unnumbered}

#### **Quality Control (QC)** {#quality-control-qc .unnumbered}

- Since the data has not yet been received, Ella has not been able to
 > assist with QC for the GeoMX dataset.

- She can provide QC support after returning, if still needed.

#### **Research Questions** {#research-questions .unnumbered}

- Ella has prepared a document outlining research questions related to
 > the GeoMX data.

- The questions may be refined as needed; the document is open for
 > editing.

> → add questions for t-CyCIF

document outlining research questions related to

- Ella has reviewed a few samples and noted that in several cases,
 > **E4-positive cells could likely be identified**.

- She was unable to examine all samples because the image files are
 > extremely large and can only be reviewed on the lab workstation.
 > They are too large for her laptop and the workstation at home.

- Additionally, two people have been sharing the same external hard
 > drive, limiting access time.
